name: Mundo Latino
description_short: Ria Money Transfer is an international remittance service enabling fast money transfers to 190+ countries through 600,000+ locations worldwide.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer is a well-established international money transfer provider with over 35 years of operating experience. The company facilitates cross-border money transfers for individuals sending funds to family and friends globally, positioning itself as a trusted platform that has completed over one billion transfers. Ria operates through a vast network of physical and digital channels, making it accessible to both tech-savvy users and those preferring in-person transactions.

Ria's service portfolio includes multiple ways to send money—online via website, through their mobile app, in-person at partner locations, and via WhatsApp—with flexible receive options including bank deposit, cash pickup at 600,000+ locations, digital wallet, home delivery, and ATM withdrawal. They support transfers across 190+ countries and offer competitive exchange rates in over 100 currencies. The platform provides real-time transfer tracking and claims to deliver funds quickly, with examples showing same-day delivery options. Additional tools include a currency converter and IBAN calculator to assist users.

Ria differentiates itself through its extensive physical footprint (600,000+ partner locations), multi-channel sending capabilities including WhatsApp integration, and partnerships that extend to sponsoring the Mexican National Team. They emphasize security through their billion-transfer history and promote a "no hassle 100% satisfaction guarantee." The platform maintains strong ratings (4.9/5 on iOS, 4.5/5 on Trustpilot) with user testimonials highlighting convenience and competitive pricing.

As an international remittance service rather than a traditional check-cashing operation, Ria fills a different market niche—serving diaspora communities and international payers rather than domestic check processing. While positioned in the check-cashing category on CreditDoc, the company's primary function is facilitating global money transfers. Fees appear competitive (e.g., $1.99 on certain transfers) but vary by corridor and delivery method. The service requires registration and involves currency exchange, adding complexity compared to basic check-cashing.
address: Mundo Latino #2, 1742 W Chicago Ave, Chicago, IL 60622

company_info.headquarters: Mundo Latino #2, 1742 W Chicago Ave, Chicago, IL 60622

pros: Massive network of 600,000+ partner locations across 190+ countries for cash pickup and in-person transactions
Multiple sending methods including web, mobile app, WhatsApp, and in-person options for maximum convenience
Competitive exchange rates across 100+ currencies with transparent pricing displayed before commitment
Fast delivery with same-day or quick settlement options depending on delivery method and corridor
Strong security track record with over 1 billion completed transfers and 35+ years of operating history
High customer ratings (4.9/5 iOS, 4.5/5 Trustpilot) with positive user testimonials on ease and cost
Real-time transfer tracking and 100% satisfaction guarantee reducing consumer risk
cons: Fees and exchange rates vary significantly by country corridor, delivery method, and payment type—not always transparent upfront
Requires account registration and verification, creating friction for one-time users compared to walk-in check cashing
Exchange rate margins and hidden fees in currency conversion can reduce the value received, particularly for smaller transfers
Not all 190+ countries offer all receive methods—options vary by destination, limiting flexibility
Primarily targets remittance senders rather than domestic check-cashing needs, limiting utility for traditional check-cashing customers
best_for: International remitters sending money regularly to family in Latin America, Africa, Asia, or Europe
Unbanked or underbanked immigrants without domestic bank accounts seeking reliable overseas fund delivery
Consumers comparing multiple corridors who benefit from the currency converter and rate transparency tools
Users preferring multi-channel flexibility, including those comfortable with digital payments via WhatsApp
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best suited for immigrant communities and international remitters who send money regularly across borders and value convenience, competitive rates, and a large physical network. The main caveat is that it functions as an international remittance service, not traditional check-cashing, so consumers needing domestic check deposit or cash-for-check conversion should seek dedicated check-cashing providers instead.
services: Online money transfers via website with rate quotes and instant processing
Mobile app-based transfers with tracking and location finder functionality
In-person cash payments at partner store locations
WhatsApp-integrated money transfers to select countries
Cash pickup at 600,000+ partner locations globally
Bank deposit direct transfers to recipient accounts
Digital wallet deposits and ATM withdrawals
Home delivery of funds in select locations
Real-time transfer tracking and status updates
Currency converter tool for rate comparison
IBAN calculator for bank transfer verification
Repeat-transfer features with saved recipient information
